title: Arena Animation Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Arena Animation Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Arena Animation Capital India in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Arena Animation Capital India:
Arena Animation Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation Capital India!
